operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Israeli Strikes Kill 5 in Jabalia & Khan Younis; Houthis Fire Missile at Israel; 72,285 Palestinians Killed
heroSubtitle: IDF strikes killed 5 Palestinians on March 31 and 3 more on March 30; Houthis launched first ballistic missile at Israel since Oct 2025 ceasefire; total Gaza death toll reaches 72,285; 680+ killed during ceasefire period; UNRWA head calls for UN investigation into killing of 391 staff
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,285+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Mar 31 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25, 2026 after contraband discovery. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. Houthis resumed missile attacks on Israel March 30 — first since Oct 2025 ceasefire.
